summary: Iteration 27: SeniorAdvisor Testing - Backend 100% PASS (15/15), Frontend 100% PASS. All requested features working correctly.

issues: Google Maps RefererNotAllowedMapError - API key domain restriction (known issue, MOCKED with SafeMap placeholder)

backend_api_tests: GET /api/auth/me - returns user with valid token
GET /api/providers/{providerId} - returns provider details with services, reviews, contact info
Provider profile has all required sections (services, reviews, rating)
Logged in users have viewer_has_subscription=true (no paywall)
All service types are valid senior care types
frontend_ui_tests: Home page loads with SeniorAdvisor branding
Home page shows hero section with senior care categories (Residencias, Cuidado a Domicilio, Salud Mental)
Home page shows CTA banner and services section
Search page loads and displays 10 provider cards
Search page has filter tabs for Residencias, Cuidado a Domicilio, Salud Mental
Login with demo@senioradvisor.cl / demo123 redirects to /dashboard
Provider profile page shows hero with provider name and rating
Provider profile shows Sobre mi (About), Más Información, Galería, Servicios sections
When logged in, contact request form visible (NOT paywall)
When logged in, 5-criteria review form visible with all criteria

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 - SeniorAdvisor app testing after syntax fix in ProviderProfile.jsx. All core features verified: 1) Home page with SeniorAdvisor branding and senior care categories. 2) Search page with provider cards and filters (Residencias, Cuidado a Domicilio, Salud Mental). 3) Login works with demo@senioradvisor.cl/demo123. 4) Provider profile page renders all sections (hero, rating, description, services, gallery, contact sidebar). 5) Logged-in users see contact request form (not paywall). 6) 5-criteria review form visible when logged in. 7) Backend APIs all working (providers list, single provider, auth). Google Maps is MOCKED with SafeMap placeholder component.

mocked_apis.google_maps: Disabled - SafeMap placeholder component used instead (shows 'Ubicación disponible')

features_verified.home_page: PASS - SeniorAdvisor branding, hero section, CTA banner, services section
features_verified.search_page: PASS - Provider cards displayed, category filters visible
features_verified.login_flow: PASS - Email/password login works with demo credentials
features_verified.provider_profile: PASS - All sections rendered (hero, rating, about, services, gallery, contact, reviews)
features_verified.contact_form: PASS - Visible for logged in users (no paywall)
features_verified.review_form: PASS - 5-criteria review system visible when logged in
features_verified.api_category_filter: PASS - service_type filter works for all 3 categories
